HGSS.595.0000:
...\f
You again?\f
There’s no need to be alert.
I don’t bother with wimps like you.\f
Speaking of weaklings, the city’s
Gym Leader isn’t here, and\r
is supposedly taking care of a\r
sick Pokémon at the Lighthouse.\f
Humph! Boo-hoo!
Just let sick Pokémon go!\f
A Pokémon that can’t battle
is worthless!\f
Why don’t you go train at
the Lighthouse?\f
Who knows? It may make you a bit
of a better Trainer!\f
HGSS.595.0001:
Dark roads are dangerous at night.\f
But, in the pitch-black night,
the sea is even more treacherous!\f
Without the beacon of the Lighthouse
to guide her, no ship can sail.
HGSS.595.0002:
That thing you have--
it’s a Pokégear, right?\r
Wow, that’s cool.
HGSS.595.0003:
Wow, you have a Pokémon!
That is just so awesome.
HGSS.595.0004:
You, young Trainer!
The sea is sweet!\f
Sing with me!\r
The sea is blue!
The sea is salty!
HGSS.595.0005:
Olivine City
The Port with Sea Breezes
HGSS.595.0007:
Olivine City Pokémon Gym
Leader: Jasmine\r
The Steel-Clad Defense Girl
HGSS.595.0008:
Olivine’s Lighthouse\f
It is also known as
the Glitter Lighthouse.
